title: Playground Review Document
concept: A document-style Playground workspace for core contributors reviewing PRs: the active Playground is treated as a project document with inline start sources, save state, saved references, runtime settings, files, blueprint, database, logs, and export actions beside a split live preview and contextual editor.
focus: dark diagnostics surface with light document cards
flows: Review a current PR Playground from a document first viewport with preview path, Homepage, WP Admin, refresh, notes, save status, and export controls.
Start Playgrounds inline from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, zip import, featured blueprints, or the full Blueprint gallery.
Save temporary Playgrounds to browser storage or a local directory with visible file-copy progress, then manage saved and unsaved entries with rename and delete actions.
Use document sections for Site Manager settings, file browser, blueprint editing, database tools, logs, export to GitHub, download as zip, and import handoff.
Browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries without leaving the review document.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
understand destructive reset and stored Save and Reload behavior
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
